name: cashsnap_webgl_trainable_candidates_v1
description: Bounded first-pass WebGL trainable-candidate suite. These artifacts are candidates for controlled P1 comparisons, not promoted production training data.

recipes.intended_use: Clean replay guard and OBB sanity dose for bounded trainable-candidate comparisons.
recipes.promotion_gate: clean cashsnap_v1 validation does not materially regress
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs real-gated clean replay comparison before promotion.

recipes.intended_use: Visible-only stacked-overlap detector and fragment evidence candidate.
recipes.promotion_gate: improves shop-overlap same-class/count metrics over no-synthetic and matched 2.5D baselines
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs P1 real overlap comparison and clean-validation guardrails.

recipes.intended_use: Handheld-fan visible-union detector candidate; fragment outputs stay diagnostic until fusion is validated.
recipes.promotion_gate: real fan metrics improve while parent fusion avoids repeated-note merge errors
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs real phone fan benchmark labels and fragment-to-parent fusion proof.

recipes.intended_use: Visible-union detector candidate for finger/hand split occlusion; fragment labels remain diagnostic unless a package gate proves they are review-clean.
recipes.promotion_gate: fragment evidence improves partial ID and fusion preserves physical counts
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs real hand-occlusion labels and fusion validation before fragment training.

recipes.intended_use: Thin-edge visible-union detector candidate with fragment training blocked until ambiguous evidence policy is complete.
recipes.promotion_gate: partial ID improves without broad false positives
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs unknown/ignore policy for ambiguous fragments and real-gated transfer proof.

recipes.intended_use: Empty-banknote hard-negative replay for false-positive guardrails.
recipes.promotion_gate: browser guard false positives remain bounded after synthetic mix
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs reviewed non-banknote background and prop library for broader negative coverage.

recipes.intended_use: Explicit front/back mixed stack candidate for old/common KHR and back-side confusion checks.
recipes.promotion_gate: old/common KHR confusion drops without clean-validation regression
recipes.promotion_blocker: Needs reviewed real confusion gates and bounded training comparison before promotion.
